---
title: "Instructor Only: Color Accessibility And Highlighting Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
census <- read_csv("data/real/census_state_race_ethnicity_long.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

asian_share <- census |>
  filter(race_ethnicity == "Asian") |>
  mutate(
    highlight = if_else(state %in% c("CA", "NY", "WA"), "Highlighted", "Other"),
    state_name = reorder(state_name, share)
  )

ggplot(asian_share, aes(x = state_name, y = share, fill = highlight)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(round(x * 100), "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Highlighted" = "#0072B2", "Other" = "gray80")) +
  labs(
    title = "Asian Share Of Included Race/Ethnicity Population",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Share",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
